categories.name: LABELING
categories.description: Deficiencies in prescribing information, container labeling, proprietary names, medication guides, and bar codes
categories.note: Labeling deficiencies are partially procedural — FDA often reserves comment on final labeling until all other issues are resolved

subcategories.name: Prescribing Information format deficiencies
subcategories.automation_method: SPL/SRPI structure validation against 201.57 required sections and format rules

subcategories.name: Carton/Container labeling deficiencies
subcategories.automation_method: Format compliance check against mandatory label elements (name, address, NDC, expiration date, lot number)

subcategories.name: Proprietary name issues
subcategories.automation_method: Similarity database cross-reference (POCA/phonetic/orthographic); final determination requires human review

subcategories.name: Medication Guide deficiencies
subcategories.automation_method: Required content section presence check per 21 CFR 208

subcategories.name: Patient labeling issues
subcategories.automation_method: Content and format validation

subcategories.name: Bar code omissions
subcategories.automation_method: NDC bar code presence check in SPL data

categories.name: FACILITY_GMP
categories.description: Manufacturing facility deficiencies including cGMP violations, Form 483 observations, pre-approval inspection failures, contamination, and data integrity issues

subcategories.name: cGMP violations (general)
subcategories.automation_method: Requires physical inspection

subcategories.name: Form 483 observations outstanding
subcategories.automation_method: Track 483 issuance/response status against FDA inspection database

subcategories.name: Pre-approval inspection (PAI) deficiencies
subcategories.automation_method: Cross-reference FDA inspection status database to verify PAI completion

subcategories.name: Contamination/sterility failures
subcategories.automation_method: Requires laboratory testing

subcategories.name: Data integrity failures
subcategories.automation_method: Requires on-site audit

categories.name: CMC_PRODUCT_QUALITY
categories.description: Chemistry, manufacturing, and controls deficiencies including drug substance characterization, stability, microbiology, container closure, analytical methods, process validation, specifications, and impurities

subcategories.name: Drug substance characterization incomplete
subcategories.automation_method: Requires chemistry review

subcategories.name: Stability data insufficient
subcategories.automation_method: Verify study duration >= claimed shelf life; check for 3 batches; verify long-term/accelerated/intermediate conditions present

subcategories.name: Microbiology/sterility issues
subcategories.automation_method: Requires microbiology expertise

subcategories.name: Container closure system deficiencies
subcategories.automation_method: Requires materials science assessment

subcategories.name: Analytical method not validated
subcategories.guidance_reference: ICH Q2(R1), FDA Analytical Procedures Validation
subcategories.automation_method: Requires scientific review of validation parameters

subcategories.name: Specifications inadequate or not justified
subcategories.automation_method: Requires scientific judgment to evaluate specification rationale

subcategories.name: Impurities not characterized
subcategories.automation_method: Requires toxicological assessment

subcategories.name: Process validation incomplete
subcategories.automation_method: Check if PPQ report is present in Module 3; verify batch count

categories.name: CLINICAL
categories.description: Clinical deficiencies including efficacy failures, inadequate study design, safety signals, and risk-benefit determinations

subcategories.name: Safety update required in response
subcategories.automation_method: Check if safety update section is present in submission per 314.50(d)(5)(vi)(b)
subcategories.note: Standard boilerplate in most CRLs — not necessarily a substantive deficiency

subcategories.name: Failed to demonstrate efficacy
subcategories.automation_method: Requires clinical/statistical judgment

subcategories.name: Adequate and well-controlled studies lacking
subcategories.automation_method: Requires trial design review per 314.126 criteria

subcategories.name: Cardiovascular safety signal
subcategories.automation_method: Requires cardiologist review

subcategories.name: Unfavorable risk-benefit assessment
subcategories.automation_method: Requires medical judgment

subcategories.name: Hepatotoxicity/liver safety concerns
subcategories.automation_method: Requires hepatology/clinical review

subcategories.name: Postmarket study/REMS required
subcategories.automation_method: Track commitment status against FDA database

categories.name: NONCLINICAL
categories.description: Nonclinical deficiencies including missing genotoxicity, carcinogenicity, reproductive toxicity, and safety pharmacology studies

subcategories.name: Genotoxicity battery incomplete
subcategories.automation_method: Check if standard battery (bacterial reverse mutation + in vitro chromosome aberration + in vivo micronucleus) is present

subcategories.name: Carcinogenicity studies missing/inadequate
subcategories.automation_method: Apply ICH S1 decision tree based on treatment duration and drug class

subcategories.name: Reproductive/developmental toxicity missing
subcategories.automation_method: Check if required based on patient population and indication

subcategories.name: Safety pharmacology battery missing
subcategories.automation_method: Check if core battery (CNS, cardiovascular, respiratory) studies are present in Module 4

categories.name: CLINICAL_PHARMACOLOGY
categories.description: Clinical pharmacology deficiencies including missing DDI studies, organ impairment studies, QT studies, and food effect studies

subcategories.name: Drug-drug interaction studies missing
subcategories.automation_method: Cross-reference metabolic pathway (CYP profile in Module 3) against required DDI study list

subcategories.name: Renal/hepatic impairment study missing
subcategories.automation_method: Check excretion pathway; if >= 30% renal elimination, verify renal impairment study present

subcategories.name: QT/TQT study deficiencies
subcategories.automation_method: Check if TQT study report or E14 concentration-QT analysis/waiver present

subcategories.name: Food effect study missing
subcategories.automation_method: For oral dosage forms, verify food effect study present in Module 5.3.1

categories.name: HUMAN_FACTORS
categories.description: Human factors/usability deficiencies for combination products and delivery devices

subcategories.name: Human factors study not conducted
subcategories.automation_method: Check if product is combination product; if so, verify HF report present

subcategories.name: Use-related risks not addressed
subcategories.automation_method: Requires ergonomics/usability expert review

categories.name: BIOEQUIVALENCE
categories.description: Bioequivalence study design, missing strength studies, and dissolution deficiencies

subcategories.name: BE study design inadequate
subcategories.automation_method: Requires scientific review

subcategories.name: BE study missing for required strengths
subcategories.automation_method: Cross-reference dosage strengths in Module 3 against BE studies in Module 5

subcategories.name: In vitro dissolution data inadequate
subcategories.automation_method: Requires scientific judgment

categories.name: ADMINISTRATIVE_REGULATORY
categories.description: Administrative deficiencies including patent certifications, user fees, and exclusivity issues

subcategories.name: Patent certification issues
subcategories.automation_method: Completeness check for Paragraph IV certifications against Orange Book patents

subcategories.name: Exclusivity issues
subcategories.automation_method: Cross-reference exclusivity database for blocking exclusivities

categories.name: PEDIATRIC_PREA
categories.description: Missing required pediatric assessments under PREA

subcategories.name: Required pediatric assessments missing
subcategories.automation_method: Check if waiver, deferral, or pediatric study plan has been submitted and agreed upon

highest_value_checks: Food effect study presence for oral forms
BE study coverage for all strengths

examples: Stability study duration vs. claimed shelf life
Nonclinical battery completeness vs. ICH decision trees
DDI study coverage vs. metabolic pathway
Human factors report presence for combination products

trends.facility_deficiency_surge: Facility/GMP deficiencies doubled from 42% (2019) to 63% (2020) and remain elevated at 40-51% — likely COVID-related inspection backlogs
trends.clinical_decline_rebound: Clinical deficiency rates declined 2019-2022 then rebounded in 2024

bla_vs_nda.bla_clinical_rate: 9.7% (vs 22% NDA) — most are biosimilar analytical comparisons
